questions.question: Which restaurants in New York Ny are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in New York Ny with weekend hours include: Woodrow Diner (Sat: 07:00-23:00), IHOP (Sat: 00:00-24:00), Yaho Sushi (Sat: 11:00-22:30), Buddy's Cafe Play Place (Sat: 10:00-21:00), Popeyes (Sat: 10:30-24:00), La Iguana Azul (Sat: 11:00-21:30), Il Sogno (Sat: 12:00-23:00), Dunkin' (Sat: 06:00-18:00) and 6755 more. 6763 total with weekend availability.
